name: octo-apm-payment-java-sidecar
description: Span query for Java payment authorization, wallet, card-network, and sidecar latency/error analysis.
queryText: show (spans) TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, SpanDuration as Duration where ServiceName in ('octo-java-app-server','octo-java-app-server-oke','octo-drone-shop','octo-drone-shop-oke') and (OperationName like '%payment%' or OperationName like '%authorize%' or OperationName like '%verify%' or OperationName like '%java%')
